alter_dataset_events: ALTER TABLE dataset_events ADD COLUMN shape TEXT;
insert_experiment: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO experiments (name, created_at, description, tags) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
get_experiment_id: SELECT id FROM experiments WHERE name = ?
list_experiments: SELECT * FROM experiments ORDER BY created_at DESC
insert_run: INSERT INTO runs (id, experiment_id, name, status, run_type, start_time, artifact_dir) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'running', ?, ?, ?)
update_run_status: UPDATE runs SET status = ?, end_time = ?, error_message = ? WHERE id = ?
insert_tag: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO run_tags (run_id, key, value) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
get_tags: SELECT key, value FROM run_tags WHERE run_id = ?
insert_param: INSERT OR REPLACE INTO params (run_id, key, value) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
get_params: SELECT key, value FROM params WHERE run_id = ?
insert_metric: INSERT INTO metrics (run_id, key, value, step, timestamp) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
get_metric_history: SELECT value, step, timestamp FROM metrics WHERE run_id = ? AND key = ? ORDER BY step
get_latest_metrics: SELECT key, value FROM metrics WHERE id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM metrics WHERE run_id = ? GROUP BY key)
check_artifact: SELECT id FROM artifacts WHERE run_id = ? AND path = ?
insert_artifact: INSERT INTO artifacts (run_id, name, path, artifact_type, file_hash, size_bytes, created_at, metadata) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
insert_dataset_event: INSERT INTO dataset_events (run_id, event_type, file_path, file_hash, prev_hash, size_bytes, shape, metadata, timestamp) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
get_dataset_events: SELECT * FROM dataset_events WHERE run_id = ? ORDER BY timestamp
